# Wolves Storage Sussex

> Safe, secure & affordable managed storage in West Sussex from £15/week. We pack, collect, store & redeliver. LAPADA accredited, fully insured, 24/7 CCTV. Free quote.

Family-run, fully managed containerised storage across West Sussex, based in Ashington (Doryln House, London Road, Pulborough RH20 3JT). We pack, collect, seal and store your belongings in an alarmed, fully insured indoor warehouse, then redeliver — no self-storage unit to drive to. Trading since 2016. LAPADA accredited, Checkatrade-verified, 5.0/5 from 478 reviews. From £15/week, no deposit. Phone 01903 893731.

- [Home](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/index.html): Safe, secure & affordable managed storage in West Sussex from £15/week. We pack, collect, store & redeliver. LAPADA accredited, fully insured, 24/7 CCTV. Free quote.

## Storage services
- [Storage Solutions](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/storage-solutions.html): Secure, fully managed storage in West Sussex from £15/week. We pack, collect, store & redeliver. No deposit, fully insured, LAPADA accredited.
- [Long-Term Storage](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/long-term-storage.html): Affordable long-term storage in West Sussex from £15/week. Fully insured, 24/7 CCTV, no deposit. Ideal for emigrating, renovations & downsizing.
- [Short-Term Storage](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/short-term-storage.html): Flexible short-term storage in West Sussex from £15/week. No deposit, weekly terms, fast collection — perfect for moves & chain delays. Free quote.
- [Business Storage](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/business-storage.html): Secure business storage in West Sussex from £15/week — stock, archives & equipment. Fully insured, 24/7 CCTV, collection & redelivery. Free quote.
- [Furniture Storage](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/furniture-storage.html): Furniture storage in West Sussex from £15/week. We blanket-wrap, collect & seal your furniture in secure containers. Fully insured, LAPADA accredited.

## Storage by location (West Sussex)

## How it works, pricing & guides
- [How It Works](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/how-it-works.html): How fully managed storage in West Sussex works: we quote, pack, collect, store in secure containers and redeliver. From £15/week, no deposit. Free quote in 24 hours.
- [Pricing](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/pricing.html): Transparent storage pricing in West Sussex from £15/week. No deposit, no hidden fees, flexible weekly & 4-week terms. Collection & redelivery included. Free quote.
- [Storage Size Guide](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/storage-size-guide.html): How much storage do you need? Our West Sussex size guide shows what fits in a 250 cu ft container, by home size. From £15/week. Free quote.

- [About](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/about.html): Wolves Storage Sussex is a family-run, LAPADA-accredited storage business in Ashington, West Sussex with 10+ years' experience. Fully insured, 24/7 CCTV.
- [Contact](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/contact.html): Contact Wolves Storage Sussex for a free storage quote within 24 hours. Call 01903 893731 / 07789 390421 or email. Ashington, Pulborough, West Sussex RH20 3JT.
